parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO attribution_data (
  session_id,
  user_id,
  visitor_id,
  utm_source,
  utm_medium,
  utm_campaign,
  utm_term,
  utm_content,
  referrer,
  referrer_domain,
  referrer_path,
  channel,
  page_url,
  page_path,
  page_title,
  device_type,
  browser,
  os,
  user_agent,
  country,
  region,
  city,
  is_lead,
  lead_id,
  timestamp,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  {{ $json.user_id ? "'" + $json.user_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.visitor_id ? "'" + $json.visitor_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.utm_source }}',
  '{{ $json.utm_medium }}',
  '{{ $json.utm_campaign }}',
  '{{ $json.utm_term }}',
  '{{ $json.utm_content }}',
  '{{ $json.referrer }}',
  '{{ $json.referrer_domain }}',
  '{{ $json.referrer_path }}',
  '{{ $json.channel }}',
  '{{ $json.page_url }}',
  '{{ $json.page_path }}',
  '{{ $json.page_title }}',
  '{{ $json.device_type }}',
  '{{ $json.browser }}',
  '{{ $json.os }}',
  '{{ $json.user_agent }}',
  {{ $json.country ? "'" + $json.country + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.region ? "'" + $json.region + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.city ? "'" + $json.city + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.is_lead }},
  {{ $json.lead_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.timestamp }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

=UPDATE leads SET
  utm_source = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.utm_source }}',
  utm_medium = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.utm_medium }}',
  utm_campaign = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.utm_campaign }}',
  utm_term = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.utm_term }}',
  utm_content = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.utm_content }}',
  referrer = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.referrer }}',
  channel = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.channel }}',
  device_type = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.device_type }}',
  browser = '{{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.browser }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Code: Parse Attribution Data').item.json.lead_id }};
